case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS GOMEZ ROSALIA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ MARGARITO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $487.37 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ ROSALIA GOMEZ MARGARITO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ ROSALIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ ROSALIA $487.37 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $524.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ ROSALIA GOMEZ MARGARITO
